name: genesis-conductor-cortex-feed
description: Yennefer Cortex Feed — live JSONL source of truth for the Genesis Conductor thermodynamic daemon and Yennefer Cortex dashboard by Igor Holt (@invariantx). Public feed.jsonl with schema supporting cortex_state_snapshot, inversion, and maru_reframe events. Fields include epsilon_th, crystalline_score, dissonance_r, trace_consent_id, and orcid_attribution. Powers real-time thermodynamic metrics (ε_th Eigen-Scalar, Crystalline Score, Dissonance R with Maru triggers). Canonical data layer for Genesis Conductor engine observability, paired with Diamond Node audit streams and OpenClaw orchestration.

plugins.name: cortex-feed-jsonl
plugins.description: Live public JSONL feed (feed.jsonl) serving as the source of truth for Yennefer Cortex thermodynamic dashboard. Supports event types cortex_state_snapshot, inversion, maru_reframe with full thermodynamic scalars (epsilon_th, crystalline_score, dissonance_r), trace consent, and attribution. Consumed directly by the dashboard and integrated with Genesis Conductor audit and agent surfaces.
